title: FIR KA/2026/00101 registered
description: FIR filed for chain snatching near MG Road metro station. Victim statement recorded.

title: CCTV footage recovered
description: CCTV from metro station and nearby shops recovered. Two suspects on motorcycle identified.

title: Eyewitness identifies suspects
description: Auto driver witnessed the incident. Partial motorcycle registration noted: KA-01-XX-XXXX.

title: Motorcycle traced via RTO records
description: Registration traced to a motorcycle owned by Suresh M (alias Suresh Biker). Known associate of Ravi Kumar.

title: Suresh M arrested
description: Suresh M arrested from his residence in Majestic area. Stolen gold chain recovered from pawn shop in Chickpete.

title: FIR KA/2026/00103 registered
description: Armed robbery at jewelry store on Sayyaji Rao Road. Three masked suspects with machetes. Loot worth Rs 45 lakhs.

title: Fingerprints collected
description: Forensic team collected fingerprints from the store counter. One set matched Anil D'Souza (FP-KA-00156).

title: Store owner's detailed statement
description: Owner described 3 suspects: leader was tall, muscular, with a scar on left cheek. Spoke in Tulu.

title: Getaway vehicle found
description: White Maruti Eeco van used in robbery found abandoned in Srirangapatna. Partial DNA recovered.

title: Court hearing for remand extension
description: Remand extension granted for 14 days for continued investigation. Prosecution presented CCTV and fingerprint evidence.
